# Copilot instructions

**Single source of truth → [`../README.md`](../README.md) and [`../docs/`](../docs).**

All agent and contributor guidance for this repository — repo conventions,
architecture entry points, commands, tooling rules, cluster gotchas, and the
**AI Governance** rules — lives in [`README.md`](../README.md) and the
[`docs/`](../docs) directory. This file is only a pointer so the guidance exists
in exactly one place and never drifts.
GitHub Copilot: load and follow [`../README.md`](../README.md) and [`../docs/`](../docs).

**AI Governance:** Full doctrine: https://adorsys-gis.github.io/ai-governance/

  The `ai-governance:stanza` marker above is intentional: it tells
